name: Average LTV with AOV [with_extensions]
description: Average LTV with AOV | lifetime value average order value | filterable by: tasks: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold, task performed date, communication medium: Call, Meeting, Email, task created by staff, task assigned to staff, closed reason and explanation, soft delete date | activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date | rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
WITH query_484 AS (
select avg(sub_query.gmv) as ltv
from(
SELECT x.mobile,count(x.mobile),sum((breakdown ->> 'net_base_rate')::float * (breakdown ->>'currency_factor')::float) as gmv
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating,
          breakdown
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   INNER join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and (rental_reservations.status in ('booked','force_booked','hold'))
    
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and x.mobile != '' 
GROUP BY x.mobile
HAVING   COUNT(x.mobile) > 1
ORDER BY x.mobile
)sub_query
),
query_535 AS (
select cast(sum(sub_query.gmv) as bigint) as gmv
from
(SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as edate,sum((breakdown ->> 'net_base_rate')::float * (breakdown ->>'currency_factor')::float) as gmv
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking,
          tasks.rating AS rating,
          breakdown
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   INNER join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and (rental_reservations.status in ('booked','force_booked','hold'))
   and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
group by resolved_at_date_ist
) sub_query
),
query_536 AS (
select cast(sum(sub_query.count) as bigint) as bookings
from
(
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as eDate,count(rating) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and (date_part('year',performed_at)=2021 or date_part('year',performed_at)=2020)
   and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
group by resolved_at_date_ist
)sub_query
),
query_537 AS (
select (query.gmv/query.bookings) as aov from
(
select * from query_535 as a
join query_536 as b
) query
)
select * from query_484 as a
join query_537 as b

   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now())
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now())
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)as query_2 on query_1.mobile=query_2.mobile
group by query_1.created_at,query_2.resolved_at
)query_3
)
select (a.repeat_guest+c.secondary_to_primary+b.primary_to_secondary) as repeat_guest
from query_551 as a
join query_548 as b
join query_549 as c

name: Repeat as a % of Overall Users [with_extensions]
description: Repeat as a % of Overall Users | repeat guest loyalty returning | filterable by: tasks: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold, task performed date, communication medium: Call, Meeting, Email, task created by staff, task assigned to staff, closed reason and explanation, soft delete date | activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date | rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date | opportunities: opportunity status, current stage, opportunity source, vertical | contacts: contact name, contact email | mobiles: mobile number for repeat guest matching
sql:
WITH query_482 AS (
select count(sub_query.count) as repeat_guest
FROM
(
SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
)sub_query
),
query_3 AS (
SELECT DATE(enquired_at), COUNT(enquired_at)
FROM rental_opportunities
WHERE DATE(enquired_at) >= DATE(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '7 days')
GROUP BY DATE(enquired_at)
order by date(enquired_at) asc
),
query_1 AS (
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as booking_Date, array_agg(opportunity_slug), count(rating) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(activities.resolved_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.opportunity_slug
                      ORDER BY activities.resolved_at) AS ranking,
          opportunity_slug,
          activities.rating AS rating
   FROM activities
   INNER JOIN opportunities ON activities.opportunity_slug=opportunities.slug
   WHERE opportunities.type = 'Rental::Opportunity'
     AND (activities.rating = 'maal_laao' or activities.rating = 'partial_payment')
     and date(enquired_at) > date(now() - interval '300 days')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
AND resolved_at_date_ist::timestamp >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
group by resolved_at_date_ist order by resolved_at_date_ist desc
),
query_2 AS (
SELECT NULL
),
query_491 AS (
select cast(sum(query_3.secondary_to_primary) as bigint) as secondary_to_primary
from
(
select case when query_1.created_at < query_2.resolved_at then count(query_1.mobile) else 0 end as secondary_to_primary
from
(SELECT mobile as mobile,created_at
FROM
  (SELECT opportunity_contacts.created_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)as query_1
inner join 
(SELECT mobile,resolved_at
FROM
  (SELECT tasks.performed_at as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)as query_2 on query_1.mobile=query_2.mobile
group by query_1.created_at,query_2.resolved_at
)query_3
),
query_490 AS (
select cast(sum(query_3.primary_to_secondary) as bigint) as primary_to_secondary
from(
select case when query_2.created_at > query_1.resolved_at then count(query_1.mobile) else 0 end as primary_to_secondary
from
(SELECT mobile,resolved_at
FROM
  (SELECT tasks.performed_at as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as query_1
inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile as mobile,created_at
FROM
  (SELECT opportunity_contacts.created_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)query_2 on query_1.mobile=query_2.mobile
group by query_1.resolved_at,query_2.created_at
)query_3
),
query_498 AS (
select count(sub_query.count) as repeat_guest
from
(
select mobiles.mobile,count(mobiles.mobile) as count
from rental_opportunities inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
and mobiles.mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobiles.mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobiles.mobile) > 1
ORDER BY mobiles.mobile
)sub_query
),
query_499 AS (
select (a.repeat_guest+b.secondary_to_primary+c.primary_to_secondary+d.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest
from query_482 as a
join query_491 as b
join query_490 as c
join query_498 as d
),
query_530 AS (
SELECT count(distinct(x.mobile)) as count1
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is true)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
),
query_531 AS (
SELECT count(distinct(x.mobile)) as count2
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
),
query_532 AS (
select (sub_query.count1 + sub_query.count2) as all_users
from
(
select *  from query_530 as a
join query_531 as b
) sub_query
)
select cast((sub_query.repeat_guest*100.00/sub_query.all_users) as float) as percentage
from

)sub_query

 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff

  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id

   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id

 ) x

)query1

WITH query_495 AS (

FROM
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from

  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id

 ) x

) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count

  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id

   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id

query_496 AS (

                 WHEN days >= 0 and days <=30  THEN 1
             END) as count,count(days) as total

             END) AS count,count(days) as total

                 WHEN days > 120  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_495
)

  (SELECT date(tasks.performed_at) as performed_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,

WITH query_1 AS (
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as booking_Date, array_agg(opportunity_slug), count(rating) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(activities.resolved_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.opportunity_slug
                      ORDER BY activities.resolved_at) AS ranking,
          opportunity_slug,
          activities.rating AS rating
   FROM activities
   INNER JOIN opportunities ON activities.opportunity_slug=opportunities.slug
   WHERE opportunities.type = 'Rental::Opportunity'
     AND (activities.rating = 'maal_laao' or activities.rating = 'partial_payment')
     and date(enquired_at) > date(now() - interval '300 days')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
AND resolved_at_date_ist::timestamp >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
group by resolved_at_date_ist order by resolved_at_date_ist desc

query_555 AS (

  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,

   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id

   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')

(

(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in

 ) x

        when query_1.month=4 then 'April'
        when query_1.month=5 then 'May'
        when query_1.month=6 then 'June'
        when query_1.month=7 then 'July'

name: Repeat Guests [without_extensions]
description: Repeat Guests | repeat guest loyalty returning | filterable by: activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date | opportunities: opportunity status, current stage, opportunity source, vertical | tasks: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold, task performed date, communication medium: Call, Meeting, Email, task created by staff, task assigned to staff, closed reason and explanation, soft delete date | rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date | contacts: contact name, contact email | mobiles: mobile number for repeat guest matching
sql:
WITH query_2 AS (
SELECT NULL
),
query_1 AS (
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as booking_Date, array_agg(opportunity_slug), count(rating) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(activities.resolved_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.opportunity_slug
                      ORDER BY activities.resolved_at) AS ranking,
          opportunity_slug,
          activities.rating AS rating
   FROM activities
   INNER JOIN opportunities ON activities.opportunity_slug=opportunities.slug
   WHERE opportunities.type = 'Rental::Opportunity'
     AND (activities.rating = 'maal_laao' or activities.rating = 'partial_payment')
     and date(enquired_at) > date(now() - interval '300 days')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
AND resolved_at_date_ist::timestamp >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
group by resolved_at_date_ist order by resolved_at_date_ist desc
),
query_504 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1
where (query_1.diff!=0  or query_1.diff is not null)
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),
query_3 AS (
SELECT DATE(enquired_at), COUNT(enquired_at)
FROM rental_opportunities
WHERE DATE(enquired_at) >= DATE(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '7 days')
GROUP BY DATE(enquired_at)
order by date(enquired_at) asc
),
query_491 AS (
select cast(sum(query_3.secondary_to_primary) as bigint) as secondary_to_primary
from
(
select case when query_1.created_at < query_2.resolved_at then count(query_1.mobile) else 0 end as secondary_to_primary
from
(SELECT mobile as mobile,created_at
FROM
  (SELECT opportunity_contacts.created_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)as query_1
inner join 
(SELECT mobile,resolved_at
FROM
  (SELECT tasks.performed_at as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)as query_2 on query_1.mobile=query_2.mobile
group by query_1.created_at,query_2.resolved_at
)query_3
),
query_490 AS (
select cast(sum(query_3.primary_to_secondary) as bigint) as primary_to_secondary
from(
select case when query_2.created_at > query_1.resolved_at then count(query_1.mobile) else 0 end as primary_to_secondary
from
(SELECT mobile,resolved_at
FROM
  (SELECT tasks.performed_at as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as query_1
inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile as mobile,created_at
FROM
  (SELECT opportunity_contacts.created_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)query_2 on query_1.mobile=query_2.mobile
group by query_1.resolved_at,query_2.created_at
)query_3
),
query_498 AS (
select count(sub_query.count) as repeat_guest
from
(
select mobiles.mobile,count(mobiles.mobile) as count
from rental_opportunities inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
and mobiles.mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobiles.mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobiles.mobile) > 1
ORDER BY mobiles.mobile
)sub_query
)
select (a.repeat_guest+b.secondary_to_primary+c.primary_to_secondary+d.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest
from query_504 as a
join query_491 as b
join query_490 as c
join query_498 as d

mobiles.description: mobile number for repeat guest matching

name: Average LTV with AOV [without_extensions]
description: Average LTV with AOV | lifetime value average order value | filterable by: tasks: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold, task performed date, communication medium: Call, Meeting, Email, task created by staff, task assigned to staff, closed reason and explanation, soft delete date | activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date | rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
WITH query_492 AS (
select avg(sub_query.gmv) as ltv
from(
SELECT x.mobile,count(x.mobile),sum((breakdown ->> 'net_base_rate')::float * (breakdown ->>'currency_factor')::float) as gmv,x.check_in,x.check_out
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating, rental_opportunities.check_in,rental_opportunities.check_out,
          breakdown
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   INNER join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and (rental_reservations.status in ('booked','force_booked','hold'))
    
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and x.mobile != '' 
GROUP BY x.mobile,x.check_in,x.check_out
HAVING   COUNT(x.mobile) > 1
ORDER BY x.mobile
)sub_query
),
query_535 AS (
select cast(sum(sub_query.gmv) as bigint) as gmv
from
(SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as edate,sum((breakdown ->> 'net_base_rate')::float * (breakdown ->>'currency_factor')::float) as gmv
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking,
          tasks.rating AS rating,
          breakdown
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   INNER join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and (rental_reservations.status in ('booked','force_booked','hold'))
   and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
group by resolved_at_date_ist
) sub_query
),
query_536 AS (
select cast(sum(sub_query.count) as bigint) as bookings
from
(
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as eDate,count(rating) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and (date_part('year',performed_at)=2021 or date_part('year',performed_at)=2020)
   and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
group by resolved_at_date_ist
)sub_query
),
query_537 AS (
select (query.gmv/query.bookings) as aov from
(
select * from query_535 as a
join query_536 as b
) query
)
select * from query_492 as a
join query_537 as b

WITH query_2 AS (

),
query_1 AS (
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as booking_Date, array_agg(opportunity_slug), count(rating) as count

  (SELECT DATE(activities.resolved_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.opportunity_slug

          opportunity_slug,
          activities.rating AS rating
   FROM activities
   INNER JOIN opportunities ON activities.opportunity_slug=opportunities.slug
   WHERE opportunities.type = 'Rental::Opportunity'
     AND (activities.rating = 'maal_laao' or activities.rating = 'partial_payment')

 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1

group by resolved_at_date_ist order by resolved_at_date_ist desc
),
query_547 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now())
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now())
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT (tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,

 ) x

and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1

select 'Within 1 Month' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 0 and days <=30  THEN 1
             END) as count,count(days) as total
from query_487
union
select 'Within 2 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 30 and days <=60  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_487       
union
select 'Within 3 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 60 and days <=90  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_487 
union
select 'Within 4 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 90 and days <=120  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_487
union
select 'More than 4 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 120  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_487
)
select month,(count*100/total) as distribution from query_488
ORDER BY CASE WHEN month = 'Within 1 Month' THEN '1'
              WHEN month = 'Within 2 Months' THEN '2'
              WHEN month = 'Within 3 Months' THEN '3'
              WHEN month = 'Within 4 Months' THEN '4'
              ELSE month END

name: Average Transaction Repeat Time (#Days between last Checkout to next Booking) [without_extensions]
description: Average Transaction Repeat Time (#Days between last Checkout to next Booking) | repeat guest loyalty returning | filterable by: tasks: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold, task performed date, communication medium: Call, Meeting, Email, task created by staff, task assigned to staff, closed reason and explanation, soft delete date | activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date | rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
select cast(avg(query1.diff) as bigint)as average_number_of_days
FROM
(
SELECT 
 distinct(sub_query.*), sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS difference, 
 sub_query.performed_at - LAG(sub_query.check_out) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_out) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_out,b.performed_at,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_out,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_out, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT x.performed_at,mobile
FROM
  (SELECT date(tasks.performed_at) as performed_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile,x.performed_at
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query1

name: Transaction Repeat Duration Distribution [without_extensions]
description: Transaction Repeat Duration Distribution | repeat guest loyalty returning | filterable by: tasks: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold, task performed date, communication medium: Call, Meeting, Email, task created by staff, task assigned to staff, closed reason and explanation, soft delete date | activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date | rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
WITH query_545 AS (
select abs(diff) as days
FROM
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS difference, 
 sub_query.performed_at - LAG(sub_query.check_out) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_out) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_out,b.performed_at,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_out,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_out, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT x.performed_at,mobile
FROM
  (SELECT date(tasks.performed_at) as performed_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile,x.performed_at
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query1
where (query1.difference =0)
)
select a.month,cast(round((a.count*100/total),2) as bigint) as distribution from
(select 'Within 3 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 0 and days <=90  THEN 1
             END) as count,count(days) as total
from query_545
union
select 'In 3-6 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 90 and days <=180 THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_545      
union
select 'In 6-9 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 180 and days <=270  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_545
union
select 'In 9-12 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 275 and days <=360  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_545
union
select 'More than a year' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 360  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_545
) as a
ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.month = 'Within 3 Months' THEN '1'
              WHEN a.month = 'In 3-6 Months' THEN '2'
              WHEN a.month = 'In 6-9 Months' THEN '3'
              WHEN a.month = 'In 9-12 Months' THEN '4'
              ELSE a.month END

name: Repeat as % of Overall Bookings (monthwise) [without_extensions]
description: Repeat as % of Overall Bookings (monthwise) | repeat guest loyalty returning | filterable by: activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date | opportunities: opportunity status, current stage, opportunity source, vertical | tasks: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold, task performed date, communication medium: Call, Meeting, Email, task created by staff, task assigned to staff, closed reason and explanation, soft delete date | rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
WITH query_1 AS (
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as booking_Date, array_agg(opportunity_slug), count(rating) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(activities.resolved_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.opportunity_slug
                      ORDER BY activities.resolved_at) AS ranking,
          opportunity_slug,
          activities.rating AS rating
   FROM activities
   INNER JOIN opportunities ON activities.opportunity_slug=opportunities.slug
   WHERE opportunities.type = 'Rental::Opportunity'
     AND (activities.rating = 'maal_laao' or activities.rating = 'partial_payment')
     and date(enquired_at) > date(now() - interval '300 days')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
AND resolved_at_date_ist::timestamp >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
group by resolved_at_date_ist order by resolved_at_date_ist desc
),
query_555 AS (
SELECT date_part('month',resolved_at_date_ist) as month,count(rating) as bookings
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
AND (date_part('month',resolved_at_date_ist)=date_part('month',now()) 
or date_part('month',resolved_at_date_ist)=date_part('month',now())-1 
or date_part('month',resolved_at_date_ist)=date_part('month',now())-2)
and date_part('year',resolved_at_date_ist)=2022
group by month
),
query_2 AS (
SELECT NULL
),
query_547 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now())
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now())
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT (tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1
where (query_1.diff>=5 or query_1.diff is null)
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),
query_560 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT (tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now() + interval '330 minutes')-1
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now() + interval '330 minutes')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1
where (query_1.diff>=10)
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),
query_561 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT (tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now() + interval '330 minutes')-2
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now() + interval '330 minutes')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1
where (query_1.diff>=10)
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),
query_562 AS (
select (cast(12 as bigint)) as month,* from query_547
union 
select (cast(11 as bigint)) as month,* from query_560
union
select (cast(10 as bigint)) as month,* from query_561
)
select case when query_1.month=1 then 'January'
        when query_1.month=2 then 'February'
        when query_1.month=3 then 'March'
        when query_1.month=4 then 'April'
        when query_1.month=5 then 'May'
        when query_1.month=6 then 'June'
        when query_1.month=7 then 'July'
        when query_1.month=8 then 'August'
        when query_1.month=9 then 'September'
        when query_1.month=10 then 'October' 
        when query_1.month=11 then 'November'
        when query_1.month=12 then 'December'
        end as month, query_1.percentage
from
(
select sub_query.month,(sub_query.repeat_guest*100/sub_query.bookings) as percentage
from
(
select a.month,a.bookings,b.repeat_guest from query_555 as a
join query_562 as b on a.month=b.month
)sub_query
)query_1
order by query_1.month asc

name: Bookings
description: Bookings | filterable by: rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
select query_1.date,query_1.bookings1 as lohono,query_2.bookings2 as wildberry
from
(
select t1.date, (t1.bookings) as bookings1
from
(SELECT -- TO_CHAR(date,'dd Mon') 
date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as bookings
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,6) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as eDate,count(distinct(slug)) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(rental_reservations.confirmed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rental_opportunities.slug
   FROM rental_opportunities
   INNER join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
   where rental_opportunities.source not in ('wildberrystays.com','club_mahindra')
   and (rental_reservations.status in ('booked','force_booked','hold'))
                        and rental_opportunities.source!='ho_app'
                      and rental_opportunities.status!='owner_blocked'
                    and rental_opportunities.source not in ('club_mahindra')
 ) x
where resolved_at_date_ist::timestamp >= (now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '8 days')
group by resolved_at_date_ist) as countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
 order by dateTable.date desc
) as t1
order by t1.date asc
) as query_1
left JOIN
(
SELECT -- TO_CHAR(date,'dd Mon') 
date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as bookings2
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,6) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as eDate,count(distinct(slug)) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(rental_reservations.confirmed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rental_opportunities.slug
   FROM rental_opportunities
   INNER join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
   where (rental_reservations.status in ('booked','force_booked','hold'))
   and source='wildberrystays.com'
                        and rental_opportunities.source!='ho_app'
                      and rental_opportunities.status!='owner_blocked'
                    and rental_opportunities.source not in ('club_mahindra')
 ) x
WHERE resolved_at_date_ist::timestamp >= (now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '8 days')
group by resolved_at_date_ist) as countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
 order by dateTable.date desc
) as query_2 on query_1.date=query_2.date
order by query_1.date asc

name: GMV Net Collection
description: GMV Net Collection | filterable by: rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date | tasks: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold, task performed date, communication medium: Call, Meeting, Email, task created by staff, task assigned to staff, closed reason and explanation, soft delete date | activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date | staffs: staff active status, verticals: development, chapter, rental, staff role, reporting manager, staff locations
sql:
select query_1.date, gmv + coalesce(cancellation,0) - coalesce(refunds/1.18,0) - coalesce(credit_utilised/1.18,0) as lohono FROM
(
SELECT date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as gmv
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,14) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as eDate,sum(actual_net_base_rate((breakdown->>'preferred_rate')::FLOAT, (breakdown->>'net_base_rate')::FLOAT) * (breakdown ->>'currency_factor')::float) as count
FROM
  (
SELECT DATE(rental_reservations.confirmed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          breakdown
   FROM rental_opportunities 
   INNER join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
   where  rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
   and (rental_reservations.status in ('booked','force_booked'))
   AND rental_opportunities.slug NOT IN ('CB62A812', 'BB80EC53', 'r-goo-96edefac', 'BDFDA003', '1F556553','DB6E5D4C')
   and rental_opportunities.slug not in ('C0ED7C50','4EEFA0F2','6C0C0CB6')
 ) x
group by resolved_at_date_ist) as countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
) query_1 

left join
(
SELECT date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as cancellation
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,14) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(
select date(rental_reservations.confirmed_at  + interval '330 minutes') as eDate,
sum(COALESCE(NULLIF(cast(breakdown->>'preferred_rate' as FLOAT), 0), NULLIF(cast(breakdown->>'net_base_rate' as FLOAT), 0), 0) * (breakdown ->>'currency_factor')::float) as count
from rental_opportunities
inner join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id=rental_opportunities.id
where rental_reservations.status in ('cancelled')
and rental_opportunities.slug not in ('C0ED7C50','4EEFA0F2','6C0C0CB6')
and ((date_part('month',rental_reservations.confirmed_at  + interval '330 minutes')>=4 and date_part('year',rental_reservations.confirmed_at  + interval '330 minutes')=2024)
or (date_part('month',rental_reservations.confirmed_at  + interval '330 minutes') < 4 and date_part('year',rental_reservations.confirmed_at  + interval '330 minutes')=2025))
and rental_opportunities.source!='ho_app'
and rental_opportunities.status!='owner_blocked'
and rental_reservations.confirmed_at is not null
and rental_opportunities.slug not in
(
SELECT slug
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking,rental_opportunities.slug,
          tasks.rating AS rating,
          breakdown
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   INNER join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and (rental_reservations.status in ('booked','force_booked'))
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)
group by eDate) as countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
) query_2 on query_1.date=query_2.date

left JOIN
(
SELECT date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as refunds
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,14) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(
select date(created_at + interval '330 minutes') as eDate,
sum(amount_refunded) as count
from rental_refunds
where rental_refunds.id != 811
group by eDate) as countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
) query_3 on query_1.date=query_3.date


left JOIN
(
SELECT date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as credit_utilised
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,14) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(
select date(credit_histories.created_at + interval '330 minutes') as eDate,
sum(credit_histories.amount) as count
from credit_histories
left join rental_opportunities on rental_opportunities.id=credit_histories.opportunity_id
where transaction_type='debit'
and comment is null
and credit_histories.type='CreditHistory'
and rental_opportunities.slug not in
(
select rental_opportunities.slug
from rental_opportunities
inner join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id=rental_opportunities.id
inner join rental_properties on rental_properties.id=rental_reservations.rental_property_id
left join staffs on staffs.id=rental_opportunities.poc_exec_id
where rental_reservations.status in ('cancelled')
--and date(rental_reservations.confirmed_at) between '2022-04-01' and '2023-03-31'
and rental_opportunities.source!='ho_app'
and rental_opportunities.status!='owner_blocked'
)
group by eDate) as countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
) query_4 on query_1.date=query_4.date

name: Leads (Sourcewise)
description: Leads (Sourcewise) | filterable by: rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
SELECT -- TO_CHAR(date,'dd Mon') 
date as date, coalesce(countTable.website,0) as website, coalesce(countTable.reference,0) as reference,coalesce(countTable.agent,0) as agent, coalesce(countTable.emailer,0) as emailer,
coalesce(countTable.google,0) as google, coalesce(countTable.ota,0) as ota,
coalesce(countTable.social_media,0) as social_media, coalesce(countTable.wildberry,0) as wildberry, coalesce(countTable.others,0) as others
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,6) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT date(enquired_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as eDate,
       count(CASE
                 WHEN SOURCE='isprava.com' or SOURCE='website' or SOURCE='lohono.com' THEN 1
             END) AS website,
       count(CASE
                 WHEN SOURCE='reference' or SOURCE='Reference' or SOURCE='word_of_mouth' or SOURCE='isprava' or SOURCE='lohono' THEN 1
             END) AS reference,
        count(CASE
                 WHEN SOURCE='agent' or SOURCE='Agent' THEN 1
             END) AS agent,
        count(CASE
                 WHEN SOURCE='instagram' or SOURCE='facebook' or SOURCE='other_leadgen' or SOURCE='social_media' or SOURCE='SM' THEN 1
             END) AS social_media,
        count(CASE
                 WHEN SOURCE='emailer' THEN 1
             END) AS emailer,
        count(CASE
                 WHEN SOURCE='google' or SOURCE='GS' THEN 1
             END) AS google, 
        count(CASE
                 WHEN SOURCE='ota' THEN 1
             END) AS ota,      
        count(CASE
                 WHEN SOURCE='Others' or SOURCE='other' or SOURCE='press' or SOURCE='event' or SOURCE='direct_mailer' or SOURCE='Direct Mailer' THEN 1
             END) AS others,
        count(CASE
                 WHEN SOURCE='wildberrystays.com' THEN 1
             END) AS wildberry
FROM rental_opportunities
where date(enquired_at) >= date(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '7 days')
GROUP BY eDate) as countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
order by dateTable.date asc

name: Prospects
description: Prospects | filterable by: rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date | stage_histories: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, stage transition date, staff who moved the stage | stages: vertical: development, chapter, stage code: prospect, account, closed, stage active, stage order sequence
sql:
select t1.date,t1.prospects1 as lohono,t2.prospects2 as wildberry
from
(
SELECT -- TO_CHAR(date,'dd Mon') 
date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as prospects1
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,6) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
  (select count(rental_opportunities.id) as count, DATE(stage_histories.updated_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as eDate FROM rental_opportunities
  inner join stage_histories on rental_opportunities.id=stage_histories.leadable_id AND leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
  inner join stages on stage_histories.stage_id=stages.id AND date(stage_histories.updated_at + interval '330 minutes') >= date(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '7 days')
  WHERE vertical = 'rental' AND code = 'prospect'
  and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
                        and rental_opportunities.source!='ho_app'
                      and rental_opportunities.status!='owner_blocked'
                    and rental_opportunities.source not in ('club_mahindra')
  group by eDate) AS countTable
   on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
 order by dateTable.date asc
) as t1
left join
(
SELECT -- TO_CHAR(date,'dd Mon') 
date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as prospects2
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,6) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
  (select count(rental_opportunities.id) as count, DATE(enquired_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as eDate FROM rental_opportunities inner join stage_histories on rental_opportunities.id=stage_histories.leadable_id AND leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
inner join stages on stage_histories.stage_id=stages.id AND date(stage_histories.updated_at + interval '330 minutes') >= date(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '7 days')
WHERE vertical = 'rental' AND code = 'prospect'
and source='wildberrystays.com'and rental_opportunities.source!='ho_app'
                      and rental_opportunities.status!='owner_blocked'
                    and rental_opportunities.source not in ('club_mahindra')
group by eDate) AS countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
order by dateTable.date asc
) as t2 on t1.date=t2.date
order by t1.date asc

name: Lead TAT Analysis - Calls
description: Lead TAT Analysis - Calls | filterable by: rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date | enquiries: vertical: development, chapter, enquiry type, enquiry location, enquiry source: Google, Referral, Website, source city, source region, trash/spam enquiry, enquiry date, NULL if unconverted enquiry
sql:
select * from
(
select a.*, Calls_less_than_2_hours, Calls_less_than_4_hours, Calls_less_than_8_hours, Calls_less_than_24_hours,
(total_leads - Calls_less_than_24_hours - Calls_less_than_8_hours - Calls_less_than_4_hours - Calls_less_than_2_hours)
as Calls_greater_than_24_hours
from
(
select t1.metric, (t1.leads1 + t2.leads2) as total_leads
from   
(
select 'FTD' as metric, count(id) as leads1
from rental_opportunities
where date(enquired_at + interval '330 minutes') = date(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '1 days')
and source!='ho_app'
) as t1
left JOIN
 (
     select 'FTD'as metric,count(id) as leads2 
     from enquiries
     where vertical='rental' and leadable_id isnull
     and enquiry_type='enquiry' and is_trash=FALSE
     and date(created_at + interval '330 minutes') = date(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '1 days')
 ) as t2 on t1.metric=t2.metric
) a 

left JOIN
(
select 'FTD' as metric, 
count(slug) filter (where TAT<=120) as Calls_less_than_2_hours,
count(slug) filter (where TAT>120 and TAT<=240) as Calls_less_than_4_hours,
count(slug) filter (where TAT>240 and TAT<=480) as Calls_less_than_8_hours,
count(slug) filter (where TAT>480 and TAT<=1440) as Calls_less_than_24_hours,
count(slug) filter (where TAT>1440) as Calls_greater_than_24_hours
from
(
SELECT slug, avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH from (created_at::TIMESTAMP - enquired_at::TIMESTAMP)))/60 as TAT
FROM (
        SELECT rental_opportunities.slug,resource_id,
        enquired_at + interval '330 minutes' as enquired_at, call_logs.created_at + interval '330 minutes' as created_at,
                RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY resource_id, resource_type
                             ORDER BY call_logs.created_at asc) date_rank
         FROM call_logs
         INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=call_logs.resource_id
         WHERE resource_type='Rental::Opportunity'
          and date(rental_opportunities.enquired_at + interval '330 minutes') = date(now() + interval '330 minutes' - interval '1 days')
    ) sub_query
WHERE date_rank=1
group by slug
) query
) b on a.metric=b.metric

--FTD-1
union

select a.*, Calls_less_than_2_hours, Calls_less_than_4_hours, Calls_less_than_8_hours, Calls_less_than_24_hours,
(total_leads - Calls_less_than_24_hours - Calls_less_than_8_hours - Calls_less_than_4_hours - Calls_less_than_2_hours)
as Calls_greater_than_24_hours
from
(
select t1.metric, (t1.leads1 + t2.leads2) as total_leads
from   
(
select 'FTD-1' as metric, count(id) as leads1
from rental_opportunities
where date(enquired_at + interval '330 minutes') = date(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '2 days')
and source!='ho_app'
) as t1
left JOIN
 (
     select 'FTD-1'as metric,count(id) as leads2 
     from enquiries
     where vertical='rental' and leadable_id isnull
     and enquiry_type='enquiry' and is_trash=FALSE
     and date(created_at + interval '330 minutes') = date(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '2 days')
 ) as t2 on t1.metric=t2.metric
) a 

left JOIN
(
select 'FTD-1' as metric, 
count(slug) filter (where TAT<=120) as Calls_less_than_2_hours,
count(slug) filter (where TAT>120 and TAT<=240) as Calls_less_than_4_hours,
count(slug) filter (where TAT>240 and TAT<=480) as Calls_less_than_8_hours,
count(slug) filter (where TAT>480 and TAT<=1440) as Calls_less_than_24_hours,
count(slug) filter (where TAT>1440) as Calls_greater_than_24_hours
from
(
SELECT slug, avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH from (created_at::TIMESTAMP - enquired_at::TIMESTAMP)))/60 as TAT
FROM (
        SELECT rental_opportunities.slug,resource_id,
        enquired_at + interval '330 minutes' as enquired_at, call_logs.created_at + interval '330 minutes' as created_at,
                RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY resource_id, resource_type
                             ORDER BY call_logs.created_at asc) date_rank
         FROM call_logs
         INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=call_logs.resource_id
         WHERE resource_type='Rental::Opportunity'
          and date(rental_opportunities.enquired_at + interval '330 minutes') = date(now() + interval '330 minutes' - interval '2 days')
    ) sub_query
WHERE date_rank=1
group by slug
) query
) b on a.metric=b.metric

--FTD-2
union

     and date(created_at + interval '330 minutes') = date(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '3 days')
 ) as t2 on t1.metric=t2.metric

select 'FTD-2' as metric, 
count(slug) filter (where TAT<=120) as Calls_less_than_2_hours,
count(slug) filter (where TAT>120 and TAT<=240) as Calls_less_than_4_hours,
count(slug) filter (where TAT>240 and TAT<=480) as Calls_less_than_8_hours,

SELECT slug, avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH from (created_at::TIMESTAMP - enquired_at::TIMESTAMP)))/60 as TAT

        SELECT rental_opportunities.slug,resource_id,
        enquired_at + interval '330 minutes' as enquired_at, call_logs.created_at + interval '330 minutes' as created_at,
                RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY resource_id, resource_type
                             ORDER BY call_logs.created_at asc) date_rank
         FROM call_logs
         INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=call_logs.resource_id

count(slug) filter (where TAT>1440) as Calls_greater_than_24_hours
from

FROM (
        SELECT rental_opportunities.slug,resource_id,
        enquired_at + interval '330 minutes' as enquired_at, call_logs.created_at + interval '330 minutes' as created_at,
                RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY resource_id, resource_type
                             ORDER BY call_logs.created_at asc) date_rank
         FROM call_logs
         INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=call_logs.resource_id
         WHERE resource_type='Rental::Opportunity'
          and date(rental_opportunities.enquired_at + interval '330 minutes') = date(now() + interval '330 minutes' - interval '4 days')
    ) sub_query
WHERE date_rank=1
group by slug
) query
) b on a.metric=b.metric

tasks.description: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold

name: Tasks Spillover
description: Tasks Spillover | filterable by: activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date
sql:
SELECT -- TO_CHAR(date,'dd Mon') 
date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as Spillover_tasks
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,6) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(
select date(reminders.due_at) as eDate, count(reminders.id) as count from reminders 
inner join activities on reminders.id= activities.feedable_id
where activities.feedable_type='Reminder' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
and date(reminders.due_at) < date(reminders.done_at)
and date(reminders.due_at) >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
group by date(reminders.due_at)) as countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
order by dateTable.date desc

name: Tasks Resolved
description: Tasks Resolved | filterable by: tasks: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold, task performed date, communication medium: Call, Meeting, Email, task created by staff, task assigned to staff, closed reason and explanation, soft delete date | activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date
sql:
SELECT -- TO_CHAR(date,'dd Mon') 
date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as Tasks_resolved
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,6) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(select date(tasks.performed_at)as eDate, count(tasks.id) as count
from tasks
inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
and date(tasks.performed_at) >= date (tasks.created_at)
and date(tasks.performed_at) >= date(now() - interval ' 7 days')
group by date(tasks.performed_at)) AS countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
order by dateTable.date desc

name: TAT
description: TAT | filterable by: activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date | rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date | tasks: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold, task performed date, communication medium: Call, Meeting, Email, task created by staff, task assigned to staff, closed reason and explanation, soft delete date
sql:
select query_2.date,cast(query_2.lowertat as bigint) as lohono,query_1.TAT as wildberry from
(
select t1.date,
    CASE WHEN t1.tat1=0 then cast(round(t2.tat2::double precision) as bigint)
    WHEN t1.tat1 < t2.tat2 then cast(round(t1.tat1::double precision) as bigint)
    WHEN (t2.tat2=0) then cast(round(t1.tat1::double precision) as bigint)
    else cast(round(t2.tat2::double precision) as bigint)
    end as TAT
from
(
SELECT -- TO_CHAR(date,'dd Mon') 
date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as tat1
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,6) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT date(sub_query.enq) as eDate, avg(sub_query.TAT) as count
FROM (
        (SELECT rental_opportunities.enquired_at as enq, avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH from(activities.created_at::TIMESTAMP - rental_opportunities.enquired_at::TIMESTAMP))/60) as TAT,
                RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY leadable_id,
                                          leadable_type
                             ORDER BY activities.created_at asc) date_rank
         FROM activities
         INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
         inner join tasks on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
         WHERE activities.leadable_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and tasks.rating != 'no_rating'
         and rental_opportunities.source='wildberrystays.com'
         and date(rental_opportunities.enquired_at) >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
         group by rental_opportunities.enquired_at,activities.created_at,activities.leadable_id,activities.leadable_type
         )
    ) sub_query
WHERE date_rank=1
group by date(sub_query.enq)) as countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
order by dateTable.date desc
) as t1
left JOIN
(
SELECT -- TO_CHAR(date,'dd Mon') 
date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as tat2
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,6) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT date(sub_query.enq) as eDate, avg(sub_query.TAT) as count
FROM (
        (SELECT rental_opportunities.enquired_at as enq, avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH from(now() - rental_opportunities.enquired_at::TIMESTAMP))/60) as TAT
         FROM rental_opportunities
         WHERE rental_opportunities.status='no_rating'
         and rental_opportunities.source='wildberrystays.com'
         and date(rental_opportunities.enquired_at) >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
         group by rental_opportunities.enquired_at
         )
    ) sub_query
group by date(sub_query.enq)) as countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
order by dateTable.date desc
) as t2 on t1.date=t2.date

) query_1
left JOIN
(
select t1.date,
    CASE WHEN t1.tat1=0 then round(t2.tat2::double precision)
    WHEN t1.tat1 < t2.tat2 THEN round(t1.tat1::double precision)
    WHEN (t1.tat1=0 and t2.tat2=0) then round(t3.tat3::double precision)
    else round(t2.tat2::double precision)
    end as Lowertat
from
(
SELECT -- TO_CHAR(date,'dd Mon') 
date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as tat1
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,6) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(SELECT date(sub_query.enq) as eDate, avg(sub_query.TAT) as count
FROM (
        (SELECT rental_opportunities.enquired_at as enq, 
        avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH from (call_logs.created_at::TIMESTAMP - rental_opportunities.enquired_at::TIMESTAMP))/60) as TAT,
                RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY resource_id,
                                          resource_type
                             ORDER BY call_logs.created_at asc) date_rank
         FROM call_logs
         INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=call_logs.resource_id
         WHERE call_direction='Outgoing'
         and call_logs.resource_type = 'Rental::Opportunity'
         and rental_opportunities.source != 'wildberrystays.com'
         and date(rental_opportunities.enquired_at) >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
         and call_duration >= 20
         group by rental_opportunities.enquired_at,call_logs.created_at,call_logs.resource_id,call_logs.resource_type
         )
    ) sub_query
WHERE date_rank=1
group by date(sub_query.enq)) as countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
order by dateTable.date desc
) as t1
left JOIN
(
SELECT -- TO_CHAR(date,'dd Mon') 
date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as tat2
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,6) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT date(sub_query.enq) as eDate, avg(sub_query.TAT) as count
FROM (
        (SELECT rental_opportunities.enquired_at as enq, avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH from(activities.created_at::TIMESTAMP - rental_opportunities.enquired_at::TIMESTAMP))/60) as TAT,
                RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY leadable_id,
                                          leadable_type
                             ORDER BY activities.created_at asc) date_rank
         FROM activities
         INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
         inner join tasks on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
         WHERE activities.leadable_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and tasks.rating != 'no_rating'
         and rental_opportunities.source != 'wildberrystays.com'
         and date(rental_opportunities.enquired_at) >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
         group by rental_opportunities.enquired_at,activities.created_at,activities.leadable_id,activities.leadable_type
         )
    ) sub_query
WHERE date_rank=1
group by date(sub_query.enq)) as countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
order by dateTable.date desc
)as t2 on t1.date=t2.date
LEFT join
(
SELECT -- TO_CHAR(date,'dd Mon') 
date as date, coalesce(countTable.count,0) as tat3
FROM
  (SELECT date (now() - i * interval '1 day') AS date
   FROM generate_series(0,6) i) AS dateTable
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT date(sub_query.enq) as eDate, avg(sub_query.TAT) as count
FROM (
        (SELECT rental_opportunities.enquired_at as enq, avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH from(now() - rental_opportunities.enquired_at::TIMESTAMP))/60) as TAT
         FROM rental_opportunities
         WHERE rental_opportunities.status='no_rating'
         and rental_opportunities.source != 'wildberrystays.com'
         and date(rental_opportunities.enquired_at) >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
         group by rental_opportunities.enquired_at
         )
    ) sub_query
group by date(sub_query.enq)) as countTable
on dateTable.date = countTable.eDate
order by dateTable.date desc
)as t3 on t3.date=t2.date
order by t1.date asc
) as query_2 on query_1.date=query_2.date
order by query_2.date asc
