name: Pending Rental Enquiries
description: Pending Rental Enquiries | filterable by: enquiries: vertical: development, chapter, enquiry type, enquiry location, enquiry source: Google, Referral, Website, source city, source region, trash/spam enquiry, enquiry date, NULL if unconverted enquiry | rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
select a.metric,a.count as lohono,b.count as wildberry from
(
select metric,count from
(
select 'Pending Rental Enquiries' as metric,count(id) as count
from enquiries
WHERE vertical='rental'
and enquiry_type='enquiry'
AND is_trash=FALSE
and source!='wildberrystays.com'
and leadable_id is null
) query_1
union
(
select 'Trips with No Rating',count(id) as count
from rental_opportunities
where status='no_rating'
and source!='wildberrystays.com'
and (date_part('month',enquired_at) >=4 and date_part('year',enquired_at) >=2020 or date_part('year',enquired_at)>=2021)
)
) a
inner join
(
select metric,count from
(
select 'Pending Rental Enquiries' as metric,count(id) as count
from enquiries
WHERE vertical='rental'
and enquiry_type='enquiry'
AND is_trash=FALSE
and source='wildberrystays.com'
and leadable_id is null
) query_1
union
(
select 'Trips with No Rating',count(id) as count
from rental_opportunities
where status='no_rating'
and source='wildberrystays.com'
and (date_part('month',enquired_at) >=4 and date_part('year',enquired_at) >=2020 or date_part('year',enquired_at)>=2021)
)
) b on a.metric=b.metric

name: Closed Reason: Prospect Stage (WTD)
description: Closed Reason: Prospect Stage (WTD) | filterable by: tasks: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold, task performed date, communication medium: Call, Meeting, Email, task created by staff, task assigned to staff, closed reason and explanation, soft delete date | activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date | rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
select (jsonb_array_elements(closed_reason)->>'closed_reason_value') as reason,count(tasks.id) as count
from tasks
inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
inner join rental_opportunities on rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
where tasks.rating='closed' and
activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
--and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
and DATE_PART('week',tasks.performed_at) = DATE_PART('week',now()) AND
DATE_PART('year',tasks.performed_at) = DATE_PART('year',now())
and rental_opportunities.current_stage='prospect'
group by reason
order by count desc

name: Closed Reason with Source: Lead Stage (WTD)
description: Closed Reason with Source: Lead Stage (WTD) | filterable by: tasks: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold, task performed date, communication medium: Call, Meeting, Email, task created by staff, task assigned to staff, closed reason and explanation, soft delete date | activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date | rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
select (jsonb_array_elements(closed_reason)->>'closed_reason_value') as reason,
count(CASE WHEN SOURCE='isprava.com' or SOURCE='website' or SOURCE='lohono.com' THEN 1
             END) AS website,
count(CASE WHEN SOURCE='reference' or SOURCE='Reference' or SOURCE='word_of_mouth' or SOURCE='isprava' or SOURCE='lohono' THEN 1
             END) AS reference,
count(CASE WHEN SOURCE='agent' or SOURCE='Agent' or SOURCE='ota' THEN 1
             END) AS agent,
count(CASE WHEN SOURCE='instagram' or SOURCE='facebook' or SOURCE='other_leadgen' or SOURCE='social_media' or SOURCE='SM' 
or SOURCE='google' or SOURCE='GS' THEN 1
             END) AS digital,
count(CASE WHEN SOURCE='wildberrystays.com' THEN 1
             END) AS wildberry,             
count(CASE WHEN SOURCE='Others' or SOURCE='other' or SOURCE='press' or SOURCE='event' or SOURCE='direct_mailer' or SOURCE='Direct Mailer' 
or SOURCE='emailer' THEN 1
END) AS others
from tasks
inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
inner join rental_opportunities on rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
where tasks.rating='closed' and
activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
and DATE_PART('week',tasks.performed_at) = DATE_PART('week',(now() - interval '1 days')) AND
DATE_PART('year',tasks.performed_at) = DATE_PART('year',(now() - interval '1 days'))
and rental_opportunities.current_stage='lead'
group by reason
order by count(tasks.id) desc

name: Gateway Bookings (MTD)
description: Gateway Bookings (MTD) | month to date | filterable by: rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
SELECT count(distinct(rental_opportunities.slug)) as gateway_bookings
FROM rental_opportunities
INNER JOIN rental_reservations ON rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
Inner join rental_payments on rental_payments.rental_opportunity_id=rental_opportunities.id
WHERE rental_reservations.status IN ('booked','force_booked')
and rental_payments.status='fulfilled' and rental_payments.gateway='razorpay'
and confirmed_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
and confirmed_at < CURRENT_DATE + interval '1 day'

name: Gateway Bookings GMV (MTD)
description: Gateway Bookings GMV (MTD) | month to date | filterable by: rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
select cast(sum(gmv) as bigint) as gateway_gmv
FROM
(
select a.slug,b.gmv
FROM
(
select distinct rental_opportunities.slug
FROM rental_opportunities
INNER JOIN rental_reservations ON rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
Inner join rental_payments on rental_payments.rental_opportunity_id=rental_opportunities.id
WHERE rental_reservations.status IN ('booked','force_booked')
and rental_payments.status='fulfilled' and rental_payments.gateway='razorpay'
and confirmed_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
and confirmed_at < CURRENT_DATE + interval '1 day'
) a

inner join
(
SELECT rental_opportunities.slug,sum((rental_reservations.breakdown->> 'net_base_rate')::float * (rental_reservations.breakdown->> 'currency_factor')::float) as gmv
FROM rental_opportunities
INNER JOIN rental_reservations ON rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
WHERE rental_reservations.status IN ('booked','force_booked')
and confirmed_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
and confirmed_at < CURRENT_DATE + interval '1 day'
group by rental_opportunities.slug
) b on a.slug=b.slug
) main_query

name: Gateway Bookings: Time Taken between Trip Creation and Booking Confirmed (MTD)
description: Gateway Bookings: Time Taken between Trip Creation and Booking Confirmed (MTD) | month to date | filterable by: rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
select round(avg(TAT)::double precision)::integer as average_time
from
(
SELECT (rental_opportunities.slug), avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH from(rental_reservations.confirmed_at::TIMESTAMP - rental_opportunities.created_at::TIMESTAMP))/3600) as TAT
FROM rental_opportunities
INNER JOIN rental_reservations ON rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
Inner join rental_payments on rental_payments.rental_opportunity_id=rental_opportunities.id
WHERE rental_reservations.status IN ('booked','force_booked')
and rental_payments.status='fulfilled' and rental_payments.gateway='razorpay'

name: Gateway Bookings GMV (YTD)
description: Gateway Bookings GMV (YTD) | year to date | filterable by: rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
select cast(sum(gmv) as bigint) as gateway_gmv
FROM
(
select a.slug,b.gmv
FROM
(
select distinct rental_opportunities.slug
FROM rental_opportunities
INNER JOIN rental_reservations ON rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
Inner join rental_payments on rental_payments.rental_opportunity_id=rental_opportunities.id
WHERE rental_reservations.status IN ('booked','force_booked')
and rental_payments.status='fulfilled' and rental_payments.gateway='razorpay'

or (date_part('month',confirmed_at) <= 3 and date_part('year',confirmed_at) = 2023))
) a

inner join
(
SELECT rental_opportunities.slug,sum((rental_reservations.breakdown->> 'net_base_rate')::float * (rental_reservations.breakdown->> 'currency_factor')::float) as gmv
FROM rental_opportunities
INNER JOIN rental_reservations ON rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
WHERE rental_reservations.status IN ('booked','force_booked')
and ((date_part('month',confirmed_at) >= 4 and date_part('year',confirmed_at) = 2022)
or (date_part('month',confirmed_at) <= 3 and date_part('year',confirmed_at) = 2023))
group by rental_opportunities.slug
) b on a.slug=b.slug
) main_query

name: Call Recording Report
description: Call Recording Report | filterable by: staffs: staff active status, verticals: development, chapter, rental, staff role, reporting manager, staff locations
sql:
select call_logs.id, call_transfer_status,call_status, call_direction, call_duration, called_number,(call_time + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as call_time, date(call_logs.created_at) as created_at, call_transfer_duration, resource_type, original_url,staffs.name as poc
from call_logs
left join staffs on staffs.id=call_logs.answered_staff_id
where called_number = '+918430600600' 
and date(call_logs.created_at) >= '{{ Start Date}}'
and date(call_logs.created_at) <= '{{ End Date}}'
order by call_time desc

name: Calendar (30 Days)
description: Calendar (30 Days)
sql:
select * from
(
select to_char(a.date,'yyyy/mm/dd') as date,sum(a.iv_b) as iv_b,sum(a.evora) as evora,sum(a.magnolia) as magnolia, sum(a.fv_d) as fv_d, sum(a.fv_c) as fv_c,sum(a.iv_d) as iv_d,
sum(a.verde) as verde,sum(a.alenteho) as Alenteho,sum(a.iv_a) as iv_a, sum(a.verite) as verite,sum(a.beira_mar) as beira_mar,
sum(a.fv_e) as fv_e,sum(a.fv_a) as fv_a,sum(a.rainbowtree) as rainbowtree, sum(a.loto_bianco) as loto_bianco, sum(a.vivre) as vivre,
sum(a.fv_f) as fv_f,sum(a.branco) as branco,sum(a.oborr_house) as oborr_house,sum(a.amorzito) as Amorzito, sum(a.nandi_farm) as nandi_farm,
sum(a.raj_angan) as raj_angan,sum(a.casa_riviere) as casa_riviere,sum(a.fv_h) as fv_h,sum(a.whispering_banyan) as whispering_banyan,sum(a.villa_amber) as villa_amber,
sum(a.ishavilas) as ishavilas,sum(a.ishavilas_5_bedroom) as ishavilas_5_bedroom,sum(a.greystone_manor) as greystone_manor,sum(a.villa_shashwat) as villa_shashwat,
sum(a.villa_alborz) as villa_alborz, sum(a.villa_azul) as villa_azul, sum(a.mv_c) as mv_c, sum(a.mv_d) as mv_d, sum(a.mv_f) as mv_f,
sum(a.mv_i) as mv_i, sum(a.glass_house_91) as glass_house_91, sum(a.villa_nimaya) as villa_nimaya
from
(
select rental_property_calendars.date as date,
case when (rental_properties.id=1 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as iv_b,
case when (rental_properties.id=2 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as evora,
case when (rental_properties.id=4 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as magnolia,
case when (rental_properties.id=5 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as fv_d,
case when (rental_properties.id=6 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as fv_c,
case when (rental_properties.id=7 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as iv_d,
case when (rental_properties.id=8 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as verde,
case when (rental_properties.id=9 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as alenteho,
case when (rental_properties.id=11 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as iv_a,
case when (rental_properties.id=15 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as verite,
case when (rental_properties.id=16 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as beira_mar,
case when (rental_properties.id=17 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as fv_e,
case when (rental_properties.id=18 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as fv_a,
case when (rental_properties.id=19 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as rainbowtree,
case when (rental_properties.id=20 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as loto_bianco,
case when (rental_properties.id=21 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as vivre,
case when (rental_properties.id=22 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as fv_f,
case when (rental_properties.id=23 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as branco,
case when (rental_properties.id=46 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as oborr_house,
case when (rental_properties.id=47 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as amorzito,
case when (rental_properties.id=48 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as nandi_farm,
case when (rental_properties.id=49 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as raj_angan,
case when (rental_properties.id=50 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as casa_riviere,
case when (rental_properties.id=51 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as fv_h,
case when (rental_properties.id=52 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as whispering_banyan,
case when (rental_properties.id=53 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as villa_amber,

case when (rental_properties.id=56 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as ishavilas_5_bedroom,
case when (rental_properties.id=57 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as greystone_manor,
case when (rental_properties.id=58 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as villa_shashwat,
case when (rental_properties.id=59 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as villa_alborz,
case when (rental_properties.id=60 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as villa_azul,
case when (rental_properties.id=63 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as mv_c,
case when (rental_properties.id=64 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as mv_d,
case when (rental_properties.id=66 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as mv_f,
case when (rental_properties.id=74 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as mv_i,
case when (rental_properties.id=76 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as glass_house_91,
case when (rental_properties.id=77 and rental_property_calendars.status='available') then 1 else 0 end as villa_nimaya
from rental_property_calendars inner join rental_properties on rental_property_calendars.rental_property_id = rental_properties.id
where date(rental_property_calendars.date) >= date(now())
group by rental_property_calendars.date,rental_properties.id,rental_property_calendars.status
order by rental_property_calendars.date asc

group by a.date

name: Pending Rental Enquiries
description: Pending Rental Enquiries | filterable by: enquiries: vertical: development, chapter, enquiry type, enquiry location, enquiry source: Google, Referral, Website, source city, source region, trash/spam enquiry, enquiry date, NULL if unconverted enquiry
sql:
select
date(created_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as enquired_at,
Concat(extract(hour FROM (enquiries.created_at + interval '330 minutes')),'-', extract(hour FROM (enquiries.created_at + interval '390 minutes'))) AS "Time Slot",
concat('https://oi.lohono.com/enquiries/',enquiries.slug) as slug, 
name, 
source,
location
from enquiries
WHERE vertical='rental'
and enquiry_type='enquiry'
AND is_trash=FALSE
and leadable_id is null
and date(created_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') >= date(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '30 days')
order by created_at desc;

name: Cancellations Report
description: Cancellations Report | filterable by: rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date | tasks: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold, task performed date, communication medium: Call, Meeting, Email, task created by staff, task assigned to staff, closed reason and explanation, soft delete date | activities: lead type: Development::Opportunity, Chapter::Opportunity, activity type: Task, Note, Document, soft delete date, activity date
sql:
select rental_opportunities.slug,rental_opportunities.name, rental_properties.name as villa, date(cancelled_at) as cancelled_at, 
date(confirmed_at) as confirmed_at,
sum((breakdown ->> 'net_base_rate')::float * (breakdown ->>'currency_factor')::float) as cancelled_amount
from rental_reservations
inner join rental_opportunities on rental_opportunities.id=rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id
inner join rental_properties on rental_properties.id=rental_reservations.rental_property_id
where rental_opportunities.status!='owner_blocked' and rental_opportunities.source!='ho_app'
and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
and rental_reservations.status in ('cancelled')
and rental_opportunities.slug!='r-cal-b2e2fc28'
and confirmed_at is not null
and rental_opportunities.slug not in
(
SELECT slug
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking,rental_opportunities.slug,
          tasks.rating AS rating,
          breakdown
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   INNER join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
   and (rental_reservations.status in ('booked','force_booked'))
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)
and ((breakdown ->> 'net_base_rate')::float * (breakdown ->>'currency_factor')::float) is not null
and date(cancelled_at) >= '{{Start Date}}' and date(cancelled_at) <= '{{End Date}}'
group by date(cancelled_at),rental_opportunities.slug,rental_opportunities.name, date(confirmed_at), rental_properties.name
order by date(cancelled_at) desc

tasks.description: task rating: maal_laao, closed, hot, warm, cold

name: Rental Credits Report
description: Rental Credits Report | filterable by: rental_opportunities: rental status, check-in date, check-out date, booking source, rental property, booking resolved date
sql:
select rental_opportunities.slug,rental_opportunities.name,date(rental_refunds.created_at) as date,sum(amount_credited) as amount_credited
from rental_refunds
inner join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.id=rental_refunds.reservation_id
inner join rental_opportunities on rental_opportunities.id=rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id
where date(rental_refunds.created_at) >= '{{Start Date}}'
and date(rental_refunds.created_at) <= '{{End Date}}'
group by date(rental_refunds.created_at), rental_opportunities.name, rental_opportunities.slug
order by date(rental_refunds.created_at) asc
